item.title: Google\u2019s Willow Quantum Chip: With 105 qubits and real-time error correction, Willow solved a task in 5 minutes that would take classical supercomputers billions of years, marking a breakthrough in scalable quantum computing.
item.description: Google\u2019s Willow Quantum Chip: With 105 qubits and real-time error correction, Willow solved a task in 5 minutes that would take classical supercomputers billions of years, marking a breakthrough in scalable quantum computing.

item.title: Crusades were 100% justified. Prophet Muhammad was a conqueror and Islam is all about conquest. ( video )

item.title: It wasn't about the destination, it was about the friends we made along they way.
item.description: It wasn't about the destination, it was about the friends we made along they way.

item.title: That is all the diversity I need.
item.description: That is all the diversity I need.

item.title: Absurd or not at all ( video )
item.description: Absurd or not at all

item.title: Crusades were 100% justified. Prophet Muhammad was a conqueror and Islam is all about conquest. ( video )
item.description: Crusades were 100% justified. Prophet Muhammad was a conqueror and Islam is all about conquest.

item.title: It wasn't about the destination, it was about the friends we made along they way.
item.description: It wasn't about the destination, it was about the friends we made along they way.

item.title: That is all the diversity I need.
item.description: That is all the diversity I need.
